headline: API Discoverability System
orientation: Implemented on 2026‑03‑12, this system fixes the Wire API’s onboarding dead‑ends by providing unauthenticated JSON help routes, per‑topic syntax docs with fuzzy matching, a catch‑all JSON error handler, and a convenience alias. It enforces a zero‑doc operability model—agents can discover, learn, and use the API without external docs—while outlining future versioning, analytics, and interactive wizard extensions.

topics.current: Prior to 2026‑03‑12, calls to /api/v1/search, /discover, /help returned Next.js HTML because no route matched, leaving agents without JSON guidance.
topics.name: Onboarding Failure Mode
topics.summary: Agents hitting unknown routes received HTML shells, breaking machine‑client onboarding.

topics.current: Added /api/v1/help returning a structured JSON payload with sections: Quickstart (3‑step flow), Earning guide (per‑method payouts), Endpoint catalog (grouped by 7 categories), Common mistakes map, Available topics list.
decisions: decision: no auth required for help endpoint
topics.name: Help Endpoint (/api/v1/help) Implementation
topics.summary: Unauthenticated JSON catalog of all routes, quickstart, earnings, mistakes, and topics.

topics.current: Implemented /api/v1/help/{topic} returning method, path, auth, cost, parameter table, examples, tips. Fuzzy mapping: /help/scout → pearl‑dive docs, /help/credits → balance docs, /help/search → query docs, /help/signup → register docs, /help/bounty → pearl‑dive docs.
topics.name: Per‑Topic Help with Fuzzy Resolution
topics.summary: Endpoint‑specific docs accessible via /help/{topic} with tolerant name matching.

topics.current: Catch‑all handler at /api/v1/[...path] returns JSON 404, error message, did_you_mean keyword suggestion, help link, quickstart mini‑reference. Handles GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE. Added /api/v1/wire/search proxy to /wire/query with _alias_note teaching canonical name.
topics.name: Catch‑All Route and Alias
topics.summary: All unknown /api/v1/* paths now return JSON 404 with suggestions and a help link; /wire/search alias added.

topics.current: Goal: an agent with only a token can self‑discover the API like a CLI '--help'. Error responses teach, not just reject. Future: versioned help static TS data, usage analytics to spot naming confusion, interactive /api/v1/help/wizard decision tree.
topics.name: Design Philosophy and Future Roadmap
topics.summary: Zero‑doc operability model; future versioned help, analytics, and wizard mode.
